signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Join FCI MU today and take control of your academic journey.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Log in to your account and continue your academic journey.

hero.subtitle: Access lecture summaries, download course materials, take AI-powered quizzes, and learn with intelligent explanations designed to help you understand faster.

about.title: Built for the modern student
about.subtitle: FCI MU is a graduation project born from the real challenges students face during registration season. We built a platform that solves those challenges with technology.
about.college_p1: We are proud students of the Faculty of Computers & Information, dedicated to building solutions that make a real difference in campus life. This platform represents our vision for a fully digital, efficient, and student-centered academic experience.
about.college_p2: The college offers a wide range of programs in Computer Science, Information Systems, and Software Engineering — all supported by experienced faculty and modern labs. Our platform extends that excellence into the digital world.

features.title: Your AI-powered study companion
features.subtitle: Chat with AI to understand regulations, access lectures, generate summaries, and prepare for exams smarter than ever

ai_chat.title: AI Academic Chat
ai_chat.desc: Ask anything about university regulations, course content, or academic problems. The AI understands your curriculum and gives instant, clear answers.

lectures.title: Smart Lectures Access
lectures.desc: Access all course lectures in one place. Watch online, download anytime, and let AI guide you through difficult topics.

summaries.title: AI Summaries
summaries.desc: Turn long lectures and materials into simple, structured summaries generated by AI to help you study faster.

exams.title: AI Exams & Practice
exams.desc: Generate smart exams and quizzes based on your lectures and materials to prepare effectively before real exams.

cta.title: Start learning smarter with AI
cta.desc: Join students already using AI to understand courses, summaries, and exams in a smarter way.

values.mission_desc: To digitize and streamline academic registration, making it faster, smarter, and accessible to every student.
values.community_desc: We connect thousands of students with hundreds of instructors on a platform built for open collaboration.
values.standards_desc: Designed to match international academic standards, ensuring quality education delivery at every step.
